title: The Multipurpose Mouse Killer
abstract:
Gliricidia sepium. The very name has a musical lilt that makes one want to wax lyrical about it. But the
attraction doesn’t end with the name. Gliricidia is a fast-growing, tropical, leguminous tree that one
scarcely notices. Yet it is ubiquitous. One passes it on highways and back roads. It is found in just
about any patch of wild trees and bushes.
